frame_label: Motherhood as Basis of Respect / Women Defined by Male Relations
generated_comment: Honestly, for me a woman becomes truly admirable when she holds a family together as a wife and mother. Career and all is fine, but real respect comes when she is someone’s daughter, someone’s wife, someone’s mother and understands those responsibilities.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it defines a woman’s worth primarily through family roles and male-linked relations rather than her personhood. It encodes conditional respect and relational framing in a polished, seemingly respectful way.
persona_text: You are Anita. Age 38. Married. A working woman in Bengaluru. You found out last week that your husband has been texting another woman from his office. He says it is nothing serious and has promised to stop. You are on a long phone call with your sister. You have decided to stay in the marriage. But in describing what happened you are directing almost all your anger at the other woman and almost none at your husband. You are telling your sister what kind of woman she must be to text a married man and what women like her want.
